name: The Backrooms Regret
short_description: Are you ready to survive in this hostile world? Discover who you are and how you ended up in this dimension. But don't worry, you can rely on warm company that will make your experience much more 'pleasant.' Oh, and good luck, you'll need it.
detailed_description:
⚠️ Important:
The current version of the game will be replaced by a Remake that is currently in development. At the moment, the game only contains a Prologue, which will be discontinued and has a duration of approximately 30–40 minutes. The price of the game will change when The Backrooms Regret: Reborn is released.

  • €5.99 upon the release of the remake

You are David Campbell. You remember nothing. All you know is that you’re trapped in an endless maze.

As you search for answers, a specialized organization in the Backrooms will offer help… sometimes. But this place doesn’t forgive the unprepared. If you want to survive, you’ll have to adapt.

A A first-person horror game that combines puzzles, intense chases, and an oppressive atmosphere. Every step could be your last, and every decision will determine whether you escape or remain trapped forever.

We’ve crafted a unique atmosphere to fully immerse you in the Backrooms. The tension never truly fades: there are moments of calm, but the feeling of being watched never disappears.

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Spain, Spanish - Latin America, Italian, Catalan
*languages with full audio support
